ns2:text.ns2:tspan: At the start of their last turn, every player may move one creature to this location.
At the start of their last turn, every player may move one creature to this location.
Whenever you play a creature here, draw a card.
Whenever you play a creature here, draw a card.
The first player to fill this location may destroy the lowest power creature here.
The first player to fill this location may destroy the lowest power creature here.
On Return: Destroy any enemy creature.
On Play: Switch two location cards with each other.
While on top: This game ends after one more round.
The first player to fill this location may move a creature here to another location.
The first player to fill this location may move a creature here to another location.
Players may only play a maximum of one creature here in their turn.
Players may only play a maximum of one creature here in their turn.
The first player to fill this location may return a creature here to their owner's hand.
The first player to fill this location may return a creature here to their owner's hand.
The first player to fill this location may look at the top three cards of their deck and return them in any order.
The first player to fill this location may look at the top three cards of their deck and return them in any order.
Only creatures costing 5 or less mana can be played here.
Only creatures costing 5 or less mana can be played here.
Only creatures with a cost of 3 or higher can be played here.
Only creatures with a cost of 3 or higher can be played here.
Only creatures with a power of 4 or more can be played here.
Only creatures with a power of 4 or more can be played here.
Costs less for every card in your graveyard.
On Play: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs one or less, play it for free.
While on top: Pay to return a friendly creature to their owner's hand.
On Play: Put the top two cards of all decks into their respective graveyard.
On Draw: The next card you play costs one mana less.
On Play: Draw two cards and discard two cards.
While on top: You may move this creature once during each of your turns.
On Draw: You may return one of your creatures to your hand.
While on top: Play with the top card of your deck face up.
On Play: You may return any other friendly creature with a mana cost of two or less to your hand.
Only creatures with a power of 9 or less can be played here.
Only creatures with a power of 9 or less can be played here.
While on top: Whenever a creature with lower power than this is played here, you may return it to its owners hand. Only triggers once each turn.
On Play: Trigger an 'On Revive' effect in your graveyard.
On Move: Move an enemy creature.
On Draw: You may move one of your creatures.
:All opponents must destroy one of their creatures.
